# Your Teleprompter

Your Teleprompter is a free web-based teleprompter at https://yourteleprompter.com/.

## What it does
- Scrolls scripts vertically while recording.
- Lets users adjust speed and font size.
- Supports mirror mode for teleprompter glass.
- Supports fullscreen playback.
- Provides phone remote controls via a secure session link.

## Audience
- Video creators
- Presenters and webinar hosts
- Interview and speech practice

## Pricing
- Free

## Primary URL
- https://yourteleprompter.com/
